title: aster calendulifolius
intro: Aster calendulifolius, also known as the calendar plant, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Aster calendulifolius include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing relief from skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Aster calendulifolius can be prepared into herbal remedies, including infusions, salves, and topical creams, which can be used to treat a variety of health issues.
